name: MSI B550M PRO-VDH WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-4400(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0/3.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - D-Sub - DisplayPort - HDMI - Realtek GbE LAN - Intel 802.11ac Wi-Fi
shortName: MSI B550M PRO-VDH WIFI Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550
description: MSI B550M PRO-VDH WIFI micro ATX motherboard with integrated WiFi for compact gaming builds.
